title: I Remember
synopsis: Graduation work of Man Wei from Musashino Art University. In ”I Remember” the juxtaposition of art styles was not only used as a narrative device, but also directly and organically as part of the story itself. The characteristics of animation was used to create an indirect metaphor for growth through the changes in painting style. As the style of the painting changed, a story is told from a childhood dream of becoming a painter, and information is collected from the dream about people, places, and incidents related to these memories. As a result of this process, a childhood was painted in a style of its own incorporating the past and the gradual shift in style as they grow up.

title: Toradora!: Ami no Monomane 150 Renpatsu!!
titleNative: とらどら！亜美モノマネ１５０連発！！
synopsis: Scene left out of episode 6 of the main series, later released as a bonus on the Toradora PSP Super Premium DVD Box.

title: Sensuikan ni Koi wo Shita Kujira no Hanashi
titleRomaji: Sensuikan ni Koi wo Shita Kujira no Hanashi
titleNative: せんすい艦に恋をしたクジラの話
synopsis: Dekao, a lonely whale, was swimming dejectedly in the ocean, desperately wanting a partner, when he met a very beautiful whale right in front of him. However, the whale that Dekao fell in love with was actually a submarine built by the Japanese Navy...

title: Soreike! Anpanman: Pantan to Yakusoku no Hoshi
titleRomaji: Soreike! Anpanman: Pantan to Yakusoku no Hoshi
titleNative: それいけ！アンパンマン　パンタンと約束の星
synopsis: Pantan is a red panda who seeks to find the treasure thought to be in a rainbow star in the night sky, in order to keep a promise made to an adventurer long ago. When Pantan and Anpanman encounter each other, Anpanman lends his abilities to help out Pantan. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Full CGI
tags.description: Almost entirely created with computer-generated imagery.

title: Wasteland Knight
synopsis: In 2145, a hundred years after the "New Humanity Project"—which was intended to fully unlock human potential—triggered a nuclear apocalypse, human survivors built a new social order upon the wastelands. In this world shaped by technology, supernatural powers, and magical arts, the only "complete new human", Jiang Li, awakened from his long slumber to begin his legendary journey.

tags.name: Full CGI
tags.description: Almost entirely created with computer-generated imagery.

title: Heroes: Legend of the Battle Disks
titleEnglish: Heroes: Legend of the Battle Disks
titleNative: ヒーローズ ～バトルディスク伝説～
synonyms: HEROES(ヒーローズ)～Legend of Battle Disks～
Heroes: A Lenda dos Discos de Batalha
synopsis: The story is set in the galaxy located near the center of the universe. There are Planet Aernia (a planet for Heroes) and Planet Orbs (a planet for robots), governed by Orbiton, in this same galaxy. Various countries are present in Planet Aernia; they are, Volculm (volcanic country of fire), Zylan (oceanic country of water), Elvan (green-rich country of forest), and Aleum (celestial country of clouds). Antania, is a nucleus of all the present countries. It has an academy that fosters Heroes. Under the reign of the Governor General, Antania upholds a national policy to train Heroes to prevent Planet Aernia to be infringed by the Dark Desire. Heroes are not only the reliable source of battle who have special abilities to freely use the battle discs, but also a symbol of unfailing justice.

title: Watashi wo Shiranai France ni Ai ni Iku
titleRomaji: Watashi wo Shiranai France ni Ai ni Iku
titleNative: 私を知らないフランスに会いに行く
synopsis: Commercial directed by Ryouchimo made for Explore France's 2024 tourism campaign.

title: Gwangjang
synopsis: Tall, blonde and blue-eyed, it is impossible not to notice Isak Borg, First Secretary to the Swedish Embassy in Pyongyang. As a diplomat, he is under constant surveillance and strongly discouraged from interacting with the locals. Despite this, he secretly dates Bok-joo, a local traffic officer, but when one last effort to extend his stay is rejected, Isak begs her to come back to Stockholm with him. Bok-joo turns this idea down and abruptly disappears. Oblivious to the danger he is putting the woman he loves in, Isak asks Myeong-jun, his assigned interpreter, for help. When Myeong-jun refuses, a desperate Isak becomes increasingly suspicious of everyone. (Source: Tribeca Film)

title: FX Senshi Kurumi-chan
synopsis: A story about the slightly dangerous(!?) investment activities of three soft and fluffy JDs! Every time the chart moves by 1mm in the wrong direction, I can feel the tears overflowing! A heart-stopping college-girl FX-trading comic for all those who want to have fun and make money! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: The Boxfish and the Sea of Minamata
titleEnglish: The Boxfish and the Sea of Minamata
titleNative: ハコフグとみなまたの海
synopsis: The boxfish has no confidence in himself, he always spends his time alone on the rocks watching the other fish, feeling envious. "Everyone else is so lucky. All I do is float back and forth in the same place on these rocks every day..." Then one day, he meets a lost sea horse who seems to have come from the Minamata ocean, he then decides to embark on his first ever adventure to return the fish to the Minamata's sea... (Source: Official Website, translated)

title: Wo, Xiu Xianjie De Gongdi
synonyms: The Public Enemy of the Immortal World
synopsis: One day, Li Wuwang suddenly awakens to find himself, as the villain, kidnapping Wan Zheng, the Holy Maiden of the Wan Chao Sect, and fleeing. Before Li Wuwang can even react, the "system" that appears before him quickly issues him a mission: strip the Destiny Points of the chosen one. Either complete the mission and survive, or fail and become an ant dying under the sword of the chosen protagonist. (Source: Youku, translated)

title: Zhanshen Lianmeng
synopsis: After a magnetic storm strikes the Blue Star Continent, spiritual energy is revived, transforming both humans and animals. This triggers a battle for survival between spirit beasts and humans. Ling Tian, a young prodigy with an ancient divine bloodline and a treasure called the 'God Brain,' discovers that in three years, the continent will face a disaster that will lead to his heroic death. Guided by Yan Ling, his assistant from the future, he embarks on a mission to attain ultimate power and change the continent's fate.

tags.name: Full CGI
tags.description: Almost entirely created with computer-generated imagery.

title: Galactic Storm Warriors
synopsis: The young human Wang Dong vowed to avenge his parents and joined the Storm Squad, determined to exterminate the Zhage insect species across the solar system. Through hardships, he awakened his Blade Warrior powers, upgraded his armor and skills, and ultimately uncovered the insects' ultimate plot on Earth along with his team. Facing overwhelming swarms, Wang activated his ultimate Blade Warrior form and defeated both human traitors and the insect leader Ying Yuan.

tags.name: Full CGI

title: Xiangzhe Xingchen de Changzheng
synopsis: Pan Gaofeng, a young rocket development engineer born in the 1980s, joined the First Academy of Aerospace Science and Technology, the cradle of my country's launch vehicles, after graduating from graduate school. He was fortunate to be a member of the development team for the Long March 5 (CZ-5), my country's most powerful launch vehicle. Working alongside his predecessors and colleagues, he overcame numerous difficulties, overcame obstacles, and defied external ridicule and skepticism. He rose from the ashes of a failed launch to ultimately achieve success, marking a crucial step in my country's transition from a major space power to a leading space power.

title: Wangu Zhizun: Li Yunxiao Zhuan
synopsis: Gu Feiyang, the third strongest warrior on the Tianwu Continent and the Martial Emperor Pojun, was bound by the world's rules, his cultivation stuck at the Nine Heavens Martial Emperor realm for many years, unable to break through. To escape this predicament, he used the affections of Qu Hongyan, the mistress of the Shenxiao Palace, to orchestrate a grand scheme, sacrificing extraterrestrial demonic energy to reincarnate and cultivate anew. In his reincarnation, he was named Li Yunxiao, a 15-year-old boy from the Tianshui Kingdom and the eldest grandson of the Li family of the Marshal's Mansion. At this time, Tianshui was beset by powerful enemies invading from the outside and princes vying for the throne from within, making the Li family, who held military power, the center of a vortex of crisis. Faced with the power struggles of everyone, Li Yunxiao stood at a higher level, calmly breaking through the impasse. He deeply understood that in this world where martial arts reign supreme,
